raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS -** A red apple is on a silver circular tray. A blue bowl, green bowl, and blue container are on the wooden table. The apple is a rigid, spherical object. STRATEGY - Reach the apple on the tray, grasp it, transport it to the blue container, and place it inside. Failure modes include dropping the apple during transport or misplacing it outside the container. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the apple on the tray; Step 2 grasp the apple for secure hold; Step 3 transport to the blue container; Step 4 place inside the container.

Goal: inside(apple, blue_container)
Scene: red_apple, blue_container, table, blue_bowl, green_bowl
Step 1: reach(red_apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, red_apple, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, red_apple) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(red_apple)
  affordance_region: the body of the red apple
  contact: holding(red_apple) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(red_apple)
Step 3: transport(red_apple -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  spatial: above(red_apple, blue_container, 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(red_apple)
  done_when: above(red_apple, blue_container, 0.05)
Step 4: place(red_apple -> blue_container)
  affordance_region: an empty area inside the blue container
  contact: surface_contact(red_apple, blue_container) [completion]; released(red_apple) [completion]
  pose: stable(red_apple) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(red_apple, blue_container) AND released(red_apple)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the red apple
the body of the red apple
an empty area inside the blue container
an empty area inside the blue container
